kpis.name: Aerials won
kpis.description: Number of aerial duels won (by first contact).

kpis.name: Defensive aerials won
kpis.description: Number of defensive aerial duels won (by first contact) in own 60% of the pitch adjusted by the opponent's possession.

kpis.name: Defensive aerials won %
kpis.description: Percentage of defensive aerial duels won in own 60% of the pitch.
